chapter_title.en: Chapter on Categories Upon Whom Zakat is Obligatory

text: 1609 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ سَمَاعَةَ قَالَ: «لاَ تُؤْخَذُ اَلْأَكُولَةُ وَ اَلْأَكُولَةُ اَلْكَبِيرَةُ مِنَ اَلشَّاةِ تَكُونُ فِي اَلْغَنَمِ وَ لاَ وَالِدٌ وَ لاَ اَلْكَبْشُ اَلْفَحْلُ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1609 - In a narration from Sama'ah, it is reported:
"The animal kept for eating, the large eating sheep among the flock, the nursing ewe, and the breeding ram are not to be taken as Zakat."
